# Preface {.unnumbered}

This course introduces undergraduate students to more advanced statistical methods than Statistics I used in the quantitative social, educational, and behavioral sciences. Students will learn:

-   Basic R syntax.

-   Data management in R.

-   Basic parametric and non-parametric statistical tests.

-   Analysis of Variance (ANOVA) Designs.

-   Multiple Linear Regression. Interaction between variables.

-   Mediation and Path Analysis.

-   Factor Analysis.

-   Principles of Evidence Synthesis (Systematic reviews and Meta-analysis).

{{< qrcode https://stats2r.netlify.app/ width=100 height=100 colorDark='#0011bb' >}}
